title: crotalaria linearis
intro: Crotalaria linearis, also known as bush calabar or linear leaf rattlebox, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria linearis include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, due to its antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
